about.title: About Me
about.p1: After a career as a <0>luxury retail manager</0> and an enriching experience in <1>tourism</1>, I chose to pursue a new challenge by joining <2>Wild Code School</2> for an intensive 5-month bootcamp.
about.p2: This <0>hybrid background</0> is my greatest strength: from my years in luxury, I've kept a keen eye for detail, a drive for excellence, and a deep understanding of client expectations. My management and tourism experience has equipped me with essential soft skills — <1>agility, stress management, and complex problem solving</1> — which I now apply to web development.
about.p3: Today, I combine this <0>operational rigor</0> with my developer skills to build digital solutions that are not just functional, but designed for user experience and business performance.

EOS.title: Personal logbook and well-being management
EOS.description: EOS is an application dedicated to well-being and daily introspection. It allows users to track their moods, record their thoughts, and grow within an interface designed to be soothing and intuitive. This project focuses on user experience, clear interactions, and simple, pleasant daily use.

L'Écrin du Temps.title: Second-hand luxury watch sales platform
L'Écrin du Temps.description:
L’Écrin du Temps is an e-commerce platform specializing in pre-owned luxury watches. The project offers an elegant and fluid experience, with optimized navigation, advanced filters, and a careful presentation of products.
Developed over 2 months, this project illustrates the creation of a complete platform combining technical requirements with high-end design.

Druïdolib.title: Application for druids and individuals
Druïdolib.description:
Druïdolib is a project created in 48 hours during a hackathon, imagining a medieval version of a medical booking app. The application allows users to book appointments with druids, mages, or witches in an immersive and quirky universe.
The project stands out for its dynamic theme system, which modifies both the appearance and the content of the application.

MoveUp.title: Inclusive sports application
MoveUp.description:
MoveUp is a sports application accessible to everyone, designed to support each user according to their level and goals. It offers personalized routines, performance tracking, and a clear, inclusive interface.
This project highlights a user-centered approach, blending accessibility, fluid experience, and visual consistency.

Neon 808.title: Electronic music label
Neon 808.description:
Neon 808 is a showcase site designed for an electronic music label. Inspired by night-life and digital universes, the project relies on a strong artistic direction, immersive animations, and dynamic navigation.
Completed in 2 weeks, it demonstrates the ability to quickly design a modern and impactful interface.
